results.title: Talisker 1988, The Distillers Edition 2001 Bottling
results.description: This rare single malt from the Isle of Skye legend, Talisker, was distilled in 1988 and bottled specially for The Distillers Edition series in 2001.

results.title: Talisker 1988 Distillers Edition | Single Malt Scotch Whisky
results.description: Comes in a regular 70cl bottle and is bottled at a healthy ABV of 45.8%. ... Delicious nose. Smokey, sweet, salty toffee. A tasty Talisker delivery with that ...

results.title: Talisker 1988 - Ratings and reviews
results.description: A good example of a good whisky with its own character. Nose 88 88 A little smoke, sweet on the nose like prunes and candied cherries.

results.title: Talisker Distillers Edition 1988/2001 (45.8%, OB, TD-S: 5CO)
results.description: Nose: Fresh, sea spray, a bit musty and woody. Easily recognizable as a Talisker with added sweetness, toffee and some meat (often with Sherry).
